string.text:
RPG-26 "Aglen" is a Soviet disposable anti-tank rocket launcher developed by NPO Basalt to replace the RPG-22 "Net", to increase the combat capabilities of motorized rifle, airborne and other units. In the RPG-26, unlike its predecessors, the possibility of a reverse transfer from a combat position to a marching position was implemented.
 
 %c[d_purple]ONE-TIME USE!

Cumulative antipersonnel projectile for a grenade launcher. With the help of the RPG-26 launcher, it allows you to hit a sheltered enemy and armored vehicles at a distance exceeding the range of throwing a hand grenade.
 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast power: %c[ui_gray_1]high
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast radius: %c[ui_gray_1]4.2 m
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Fragments' radius: %c[ui_gray_1]36 m
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Av. number of fragments: %c[ui_gray_1]153 (small shrapnels)
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Explosion delay: %c[ui_gray_1]none (explodes on impact)
